violations.text: The floor in the walk-in cooler is in poor repair. Floor covering is observed to be torn/worn exposing the wood subfloor structure. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable, nonabsorbent, and maintained in good repair for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The floor in the walk-in cooler is in poor repair. Floor covering is observed to be torn/worn exposing the wood subfloor structure. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable, nonabsorbent, and maintained in good repair for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
